heading: Exception relating to activities of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration
label: 9531 Exception relating to activities of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “This Act” and was translated as reading “This title”, meaning title II of , , , known as the Countering Russian Influence in Europe and Eurasia Act of 2017, which is classified principally to this chapter. children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: This chapter and the amendments made by this Act shall not apply with respect to activities of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
the National Aeronautics and Space Administration; or
any other non-Department of Defense customer.
